config.name: Query Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms)  AS "p50 (ms)",
  quantile(0.9)(query_duration_ms)  AS "p90 (ms)",
  quantile(0.99)(query_duration_ms) AS "p99 (ms)"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.query_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND query_kind = 'Select'
  AND (type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' OR type = 'QueryFinish')
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Query Count by Table
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  arrayStringConcat(tables, ', ') AS table,
  type,
  count() AS "Query Count"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.query_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND query_kind = 'Select'
  AND (type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' OR type = 'QueryFinish' OR type = 'ExceptionBeforeStart')
GROUP BY ts, table, type
ORDER BY ts
LIMIT 1000

config.name: Most Time Consuming Query Patterns
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  count()                               AS "Count",
  sum(query_duration_ms)                AS "Total Duration (ms)",
  any(query)                            AS "Query Example",
  normalized_query_hash                 AS "Query Hash",
  arrayStringConcat(tables, ', ')       AS "Tables"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.query_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND (type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' OR type = 'QueryFinish')
  AND query_kind = 'Select'
GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, tables
ORDER BY sum(query_duration_ms) DESC
LIMIT 20

config.name: Slowest Queries
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  event_time,
  query_kind,
  read_rows,
  formatReadableSize(memory_usage) AS memory_usage,
  query_duration_ms,
  query
FROM clickstack_consolidated.query_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND (type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' OR type = 'QueryFinish')
  AND query_kind = 'Select'
ORDER BY query_duration_ms DESC
LIMIT 100

config.name: Insert Queries Per Table
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  arrayStringConcat(tables, ', ') AS table,
  count() AS "Insert Queries"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.query_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND query_kind = 'Insert'
  AND type = 'QueryStart'
GROUP BY ts, table
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Max Active Parts per Partition
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  max(value) AS "Max Parts per Partition"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.asynchronous_metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND metric = 'MaxPartCountForPartition'
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Active Parts Per Partition
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  count()        AS "Part Count",
  sum(rows)      AS "Rows",
  database       AS "Database",
  table          AS "Table",
  partition      AS "Partition"
FROM system.parts
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY database, table, partition
ORDER BY count() DESC
LIMIT 100

config.name: CPU Usage (Cores)
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  avg(ProfileEvent_OSCPUVirtualTimeMicroseconds) / 1000000 AS "CPU Cores"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Memory Usage
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  avg(CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking) AS "Bytes"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Disk I/O
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  avg(ProfileEvent_OSReadChars)  AS "Bytes Read",
  avg(ProfileEvent_OSWriteChars) AS "Bytes Written"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: S3 Requests
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  avg(CurrentMetric_S3Requests)      AS "All Requests",
  avg(ProfileEvent_S3GetObject)      AS "GetObject Requests",
  avg(ProfileEvent_S3PutObject)      AS "PutObject Requests",
  avg(ProfileEvent_S3ListObjects)    AS "ListObjects Requests",
  avg(ProfileEvent_S3UploadPart)     AS "UploadPart Requests"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

config.name: Network (machine-wide receive/send bytes)
config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL {intervalSeconds:Int64} second) AS ts,
  metric,
  avg(value) AS "Bytes"
FROM clickstack_consolidated.asynchronous_metric_log
WHERE event_time >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND event_time <  fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND (metric ILIKE 'NetworkReceiveBytes_%' OR metric ILIKE 'NetworkSendBytes_%')
GROUP BY ts, metric
ORDER BY ts
